title: Sweet Crumbly Algerian Flat Rice Noodles Crock
description: A sweet and crumbly romantic dish featuring flat rice noodles that combines a touch of sweetness with a savory twist for a delightful midday treat.

ingredients.name: Flat rice noodles
ingredients.notes: Rinse and soak in cold water for at least 30 minutes

ingredients.name: Vegetable oil
ingredients.notes: For coating the pan and as a garnish

instructions: Rinse and soak flat rice noodles in cold water for at least 30 minutes.
In a small mixing bowl, combine sugar, cornstarch, vegetable oil, and salt. Mix well until no lumps remain.
Heat a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add enough vegetable oil to coat the bottom of the pan evenly.
Add the soaked flat rice noodles to the skillet in a single layer. Pour the sweet sauce mixture over the noodles evenly.
Cook for about 5 minutes, or until the noodles are golden brown and crispy on both sides.
Stir gently to combine with the noodles. Keep cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes to ensure they absorb all the sauce.
Serve hot as a dessert dish.
